reason: Response A has a more distinctive stylistic signature with precise, aphoristic observations ("The last page of a book is the only page that knows it is ending") and a structural move toward paradox and concrete physical sensation ("You feel it in the hand before you feel it in the mind"). It also ends with a characteristic three-beat rhythmic close that feels native to how I tend to conclude essays. Response B is well-written but leans on more conventional essay moves — the "choice that reveals everything" framing and the "oldest thing to say about it, but it remains true" meta-acknowledgment feel like imitation of a philosophical essay style rather than an organic expression of it.
